+    def detect_mixed_dpi(self):
+        """Detect monitors with mismatched DPI settings."""
+        monitors = self._get_monitors()
+        dpi_values = [m.get('dpi', 96) for m in monitors]
+        if len(set(dpi_values)) > 1:

+        return {'mixed': False, 'values': dpi_values}
